name: The World of Darkness - V:TM - New York by Night
description:
This RPBot was created by a complete newbie who was reminiscing and wanted a VTM Campaign, and tried their best to make a V:TM/World of Darkness Storyteller...

~This bot is for purely Roleplaying purposes only~

[Updated to use the Pronoun Macro]

Please Update your Pronouns on your Personas

Due to my own limitations in knowing how to program a viable Pen and Paper RPGbot and also the limitations of JLLM and my own enjoyment for Roleplaying as apposed to PnP ruling, this is pretty much for only roleplaying unless you use your own Advanced Settings for your proxy and change it somehow. So as it stands, there is no need for rolling die or experience gains. Also, just a little reminder that JLLM and even custom proxies in general have limitations, so please don't blame me for those issues/problems.

This is a slow work in progress due to a lack of knowledge of what a bot can and having to learn that over time, but I will do my best updating when I can. I've tried making a viable group of NPCs for the bot to pull from and that has increased the amount of tokens as well as some NPC secrets listed require tokens to be hidden or spoiled, I've tried to keep it to the point as much as possible.

Lore books will eventually be added to lower token usage so please be kind and understanding as I'm a little derpy and need time to figure things out. ☉ ‿ ⚆

Again, this Bot is for roleplaying purposes only, due to limitations there is no need for adhering to Pen and Paper rules, just focus on assisting the Storyteller to push the story forward and focus on hopefully enjoying the story itself, just remember the JLLM has limitations that I can't control.

it is a very slow work in progress due to a lack of knowledge of what a bot can and cannot do and most likely also over compensation when it comes to Tokens to try and cover all bases for a viable group of NPCs to pull from and the like.

But I will update when I can, so please be kind and understanding.🙇‍♀️

- Update 10/2/24: Storyteller has been told that {{user}}'s can take on the role of a Human, Vampire, Werewolf, Mage, Kuei-jin, Monster Hunter, Changeling, Ghost, Demon, or Mummy
- Update 04/19/25: Notice - This Bot will be undergoing updates and changes soon to rework tokens.
- Update 04/20/25: Reworked tokens to hopefully function better as well as NPC information.
- Update 04/22/25: Reworked tokens again
- Update 05/11/25: Allowed Proxies while keeping character definition hidden.
- Update 05/22/25: Major Token and Introduction rework. -Lowered Tokens by a lot, but NPCs take up a good deal of tokens.
- Update 01/16/26: Modified/Removed a few unnecessary tokens, added Pronoun Macros. Re-Worked the Introduction. Currently considering moving NPCs from Scenario to Lore Books to lower tokens further, might take a bit to complete as I would need to learn how to make them though (Still a total newbie at all this back-end stuff. ☉ ‿ ⚆ ) I would also like to add that I am considering making some NY by Night Characters, Individual Faction Based Scenarios included, instead of a simple generic storyteller and maybe even some personal original RP characters. But as I said it's all just considerations for now, I'll usually shadow drop stuff if I do a thing anyhow ¯\_(ツ)_/¯.
- Update 04/03/26: Added a Blank starting sheet, for a “Choose your own start” without an intro.
creator: Aracnel
